t.t-elif: o and 'company_id' in o and o.company_id.sudo()

div.p: This is a Computer Generated Document

td.style: width: 15%; text-align: right; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; color: #F7374F; vertical-align: top;
text-align: end; font-style: italic; border: 1px solid black; margin-right:10px; padding:30px
text-align: end; border: 1px solid black; padding-top:30px

tr.p: We declare that this invoice shows the actual price of the goods described and that all particulars are true and correct.
for KPT Piping System Pvt. Ltd.

td.style: width: 15%; text-align: right; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; color: #F7374F; vertical-align: top;
text-align: end; font-style: italic; border: 1px solid black; margin-right:10px; padding:30px
text-align: end; border: 1px solid black; padding-top:30px

tr.p: We declare that this invoice shows the actual price of the goods described and that all particulars are true and correct.
for KPT Piping System Pvt. Ltd.

td.style: width: 15%; text-align: right; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; color: #F7374F; vertical-align: top;
text-align: end; font-style: italic; border: 1px solid black; margin-right:10px; padding:30px
text-align: end; border: 1px solid black; padding-top:30px

tr.p: We declare that this invoice shows the actual price of the goods described and that all particulars are true and correct.
for KPT Piping System Pvt. Ltd.

record.field: Sent to vendor with the purchase order in attachment

div.p:
Dear Brandon Freeman
(Azure Interior)
Here is in attachment a purchase order P00015
with reference: REF_XXX
amounting in $ 10.00 from YourCompany.
The receipt is expected for 05/05/2021.
Could you please acknowledge the receipt of this order?
--
Mitchell Admin
